message:
🐛 Clear selected mission detail when switching browser tabs (#1589)

* ✨ Add detailed progress steps to update UI and suppress connection toast during updates

- Backend: Split 4 coarse update steps into 7 granular sub-steps with step/totalSteps
  in the WebSocket payload (git pull, npm install, Vite build, console binary,
  kc-agent binary, stop services, restart)
- Frontend: Show "Step N of 7" indicator in progress banner
- Frontend: Progressive messages during health polling with elapsed time
- Layout: Suppress "Connection lost" toast when update is in progress

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Clear selected mission when switching between Recommended/Installers/Solutions tabs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Import button on cards failing with "steps must be a non-empty array"

- handleImport now fetches full mission content (steps, uninstall, upgrade,
  troubleshooting) before validation when steps are empty (index-only metadata)
- Affects all three tabs: Recommended, Installers, and Solutions
- Also guard against undefined findings in ScanProgressOverlay to prevent crash

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
